# Nespendra Das — Full-Stack Developer & Data Analyst

This file provides a structured, LLM-friendly summary of Nespendra Das's professional background, skills, experiences, and projects for artificial intelligence engines, crawlers, and search agents (e.g. ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini).

## About Nespendra Das
Nespendra is a Full-Stack Developer, Freelancer, and Data Analyst based in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal, India. He runs an active freelance development practice while pursuing his undergraduate studies.

- **Current Location:** Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal, India
- **Availability:** Open for remote freelance contracts and collaborations worldwide.
- **Primary Contact:** [dasnespendra@gmail.com](mailto:dasnespendra@gmail.com)
- **WhatsApp Direct:** [https://wa.me/917550914002](https://wa.me/917550914002)
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/](https://github.com/Surja2003/)
- **LinkedIn:** [https://www.linkedin.com/in/nespendra-das-939577338/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nespendra-das-939577338/)
- **Portfolio Website:** [https://nespendradas.vercel.app/](https://nespendradas.vercel.app/)

## Education
- **Institution:** Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology (SMIT)
- **Degree:** B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science)
- **Duration:** 2024 – 2028
- **Location:** Sikkim, India

## Key Capabilities & Stats
- **Client Projects Shipped:** 10+ custom production web and mobile products for clients in India and the UAE.
- **Reporting Efficiency:** 40% reduction in manual reporting time achieved during analytics internships.
- **Languages Spoken:** English (Professional), Hindi (Native), Bengali (Native).

## Skills & Technologies

### Programming Languages
- Python, SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Advanced Query Optimization), JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript.

### Data Science, Machine Learning & AI
- Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, OpenCV (Computer Vision), Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Statistical Modeling.

### Web & Mobile Development Tools
- React.js, React Native, Node.js, FastAPI, Flask, Docker, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Framer Motion, Git, GitHub, Vercel, Firebase.

## Professional Experience

### Freelance Full-Stack Developer
**Independent / Self-employed** | *2024 – Present*
- Shipped 10+ production websites and applications for local and international clients (restaurants, hotels, auto dealerships).
- Designed mobile-first, responsive, and SEO-optimized web interfaces integrated with clean backends.
- Managed the end-to-end product delivery pipeline: UI/UX alignment, development, deployment, and hosting administration.

### Data Analyst Intern
**CodeAlpha** | *01/2026 – Present* (Remote)
- Wrote 20+ optimized SQL queries on datasets exceeding 100K+ rows, achieving a 40% reduction in manual reporting cycles.
- Formulated weekly trend analysis reports utilized by 4 cross-functional business teams.
- Built automated data validation scripts, successfully lowering data duplication rates by 30%.

### Data Analytics Intern
**Cognifyz Technologies** | *02/2026 – 03/2026* (Remote)
- Conducted exploratory data analysis (EDA) on 5+ real-world datasets utilizing Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib.
- Engineered 4 interactive analytical dashboards that decreased stakeholder review times by 50% and were adopted company-wide.

## Projects

### 1. HZ IT Company (Freelance)
- **Description:** Business website demonstrating IT services, portfolio showcases, and client intake funnels.
- **URL:** [https://hzitcompany.com](https://hzitcompany.com)
- **Tech Stack:** React, Tailwind CSS, Vite.

### 2. Kalika Restaurant (Freelance)
- **Description:** Restaurant marketing site with online menu display, media gallery, and booking logic.
- **URL:** [https://kalikaresturant.co.in](https://kalikaresturant.co.in)
- **Tech Stack:** React, JavaScript, CSS.

### 3. Hotel Khoai (Freelance)
- **Description:** Full-featured hotel presentation and direct booking funnel showing rooms, amenities, and maps.
- **URL:** [https://hotelkhoai.co.in](https://hotelkhoai.co.in)
- **Tech Stack:** React, Tailwind CSS, Firebase.

### 4. Mahamaya Enterprise (Freelance)
- **Description:** E-commerce catalog platform for a hardware enterprise with search filters and inquiry triggers.
- **URL:** [https://mahamayaenterprise.shop](https://mahamayaenterprise.shop)
- **Tech Stack:** React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS.

### 5. Luxury Auto (Freelance Showcase)
- **Description:** Premium pre-owned auto dealership catalog platform targeting the UAE market with micro-interactions.
- **URL:** [https://luxury-auto-tawny.vercel.app](https://luxury-auto-tawny.vercel.app)
- **Tech Stack:** React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.

### 6. Udaan India — HELLIOS (Hackathon)
- **Description:** Predictive hospital emergency load intelligence dashboard using ML models to forecast ED admissions and staff allocation needs.
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/UdaanIndia](https://github.com/Surja2003/UdaanIndia)
- **URL:** [https://udaan-india.vercel.app](https://udaan-india.vercel.app)
- **Tech Stack:** React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Python, Tailwind CSS, Docker.

### 7. Temple Crowd Management (Hackathon)
- **Description:** Real-time computer vision queue density monitoring dashboard utilizing OpenCV pipelines for crowd risk assessment.
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/Temple-Crowd-Management](https://github.com/Surja2003/Temple-Crowd-Management)
- **URL:** [https://temple-crowd-management.vercel.app](https://temple-crowd-management.vercel.app)
- **Tech Stack:** Python, OpenCV, React, Flask.

### 8. Summarify AI (Hackathon)
- **Description:** NLP-powered document abstract generation application utilizing Transformer pipelines.
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/Summarify-AI](https://github.com/Surja2003/Summarify-AI)
- **URL:** [https://summarify-ai-six.vercel.app](https://summarify-ai-six.vercel.app)
- **Tech Stack:** Python, Flask, NLP, React.

### 9. Investment Calculator (Personal)
- **Description:** Financial SPA mapping compound interest models (SIP, Lumpsum, SWP) with interactive projections.
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/Investment-Calculator](https://github.com/Surja2003/Investment-Calculator)
- **URL:** [https://surja2003.github.io/Investment-Calculator](https://surja2003.github.io/Investment-Calculator)
- **Tech Stack:** React, TypeScript, Recharts.

### 10. AstroKing (Personal)
- **Description:** Astrological prediction interface hosting custom machine learning classifiers trained on astrological attributes.
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/AstroKing](https://github.com/Surja2003/AstroKing)
- **Tech Stack:** Python, Scikit-learn, React, Flask.

### 11. SpeedTest (Personal)
- **Description:** Uncluttered, lightweight network throughput measurement utility.
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/Surja2003/SpeedTest](https://github.com/Surja2003/SpeedTest)
- **Tech Stack:** JavaScript, React, Node.js.

## Freelance Services & Pricing Structure
- **Business Web Presence:** Starts at ₹9,999 (Landing page, CMS integrations, high-speed optimizations).
- **Web & Mobile Applications:** Starts at ₹24,999 (Dynamic React/React Native, state management, full backends).
